metaDescription: Check domain availability across .com, .ai, .io and custom TLD lists with WHOIS and RDAP results. Fast, free, no signup required.
heroSubtitle: Enter a keyword. Scan the results.
tldHint: One TLD per line. Empty uses the default set.
errorNetwork: Query failed. Please check your connection.
errorSearchFailed: Query failed. Check the input or try again shortly.
errorInvalidKeyword: Use letters, numbers, and hyphens only. The keyword cannot start or end with a hyphen.
errorInvalidTld: "{tld}" is not a valid TLD. Use one TLD per line, without dots.
panelAvailable: This domain is available for registration
panelReserved: This domain is reserved by the registry and cannot be registered through normal channels.
panelUnknown: Unable to determine domain status. WHOIS/RDAP queries returned no valid data.
registrationNoPrices: No registrar price is configured for this TLD yet. Use a registrar link to confirm availability and checkout price.
priceDisclaimer: Prices are reference first-year registration prices last updated {date}. Final availability, premium pricing, taxes, and fees are confirmed by the registrar.
previewPlaceholderText: Load it only when you want to request a preview from screenshot.domains.
faqWhatAnswer: dmcheck lets you enter a keyword to check whether domains with multiple TLDs are available. Results are fetched in real time via WHOIS and RDAP protocols and streamed back one by one.
faqFreeAnswer: dmcheck is completely free with no usage limits and no registration required.
faqUnknownAnswer: Some registries' WHOIS servers may be slow or refuse connections. You can click the row to open the detail panel — the system will retry with a separate query and may get a result.
faqAvailableReal: Does "Available" guarantee I can register it?
faqAvailableRealAnswer: Not necessarily. Results are based on WHOIS/RDAP data which may have slight delays. Registrar prices are reference first-year prices and can change at checkout. Confirm availability, eligibility, taxes, fees, and final price with a registrar before purchasing.
faqTLDsAnswer1: By default, 15 popular TLDs are checked. Click "TLD Settings" to customize — your list is saved in the browser.
faqTLDsAnswer2: TLDs with direct WHOIS: com, net, org, biz, info, name, pro, mobi, app, dev, xyz, top, site, online, store, tech, cloud, blog, shop, club, live, space, fun, vip, work, ltd, group, world, link, life, icu, design, studio, global, digital, network, solutions, media, services, agency, run, ink, pub, wiki, plus, cool, zone, today, one, domains, fish, surf, town, now, io, ai, co, me, im, cc, tv, us, cn, uk, de, fr, jp, kr, au, ca, ru, in, nl, eu, it, se, ch, be, pl, nz, sg, hk, tw, is, sh
faqTLDsAnswer3: TLDs not in the list above will be queried via RDAP protocol, which has broader coverage.
faqSource: Where does the data come from?
faqSourceAnswer: Domain status queries go directly to registry WHOIS/RDAP services. The optional screenshot preview is loaded only when you click "Load screenshot" and is requested from screenshot.domains.
faqCacheAnswer: Registered and reserved domains are cached longer to speed up repeat queries. Available status is not cached by default, and the detail panel still fetches full live details.
faqPrivacyAnswer: dmcheck does not store query keywords linked to user identity. We use Google Analytics to collect anonymous traffic statistics. Server logs are used for troubleshooting only and are never sold to third parties.
faqAPIAnswer: No public API at the moment. If you have bulk query or integration needs, feel free to contact us.
footerSlogan: Free domain availability checker powered by WHOIS & RDAP
seoLead: Free domain availability checker for .com, .ai, .io and custom TLD lists. Results use WHOIS and RDAP data and update as each registry responds.
snapshotSubtitle: Preview the compact share image before exporting.
snapshotFailed: Could not create the image. Try again.
snapshotCopyUnavailable: Image copy is not supported in this browser.
snapshotShareUnavailable: System share is not available in this browser.
